title: KPack 1.8.9
description: A modpack meant to give players on 1.8.9 a better experience.
body:
# KPack 1.8.9

## Please add **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/)** to your modpack instance.

This is a modpack meant to make Minecraft 1.8.9 a better and faster experience.

# Benchmarks
## All modpacks in the benchmarks had **OptiFine HD U M5** added to them, no motion blur enabled,  and are at the fastest OptiFine settings. (8 Render distance)
## PC Specs
- CPU: Intel i7-1360P (12-Core) @ 5.00 GHz
- GPU: Intel Iris Xe @ 1.50 GHz (Integrated Graphics)
- RAM: 32GB SODIMM DDR4-3200 (x2 16GB)
- OS: EndeavourOS x86_64 (arch btw)
## Hyipxel Bedwars lobby
### This modpack:
- Highest FPS: 201 (Standing on the bed on the left)
- Lowest FPS: 12 (Loading in to the server)
### Optimized fps:
- Highest FPS: 178 (Standing on the bed on the left)
- Lowest FPS: 44 (Loading in to the server)
### Vanilla 1.8.9
- Highest FPS: 132 (Standing on the bed on the left)
- Lowest FPS: 63 (Loading in to the server)
# Q&A
### Why this modpack?
People should use this modpack because it gives you the best framerates on Minecraft 1.8.9 over other modpacks, such as Optimized fps. And, this modpack is better than other clients because Lunar has bad FPS and Badlion stole mods from other independant clients, and neither of them let you use your own mods.
### Will my FPS be higher while using this?
Yes! People should see a **1.5%-2.5%** FPS increase from vanilla Minecraft. **(This heavily depends on your system)**
### Will this modpack use more PC resources than vanilla 1.8.9?
Yes. The modpack will use more resources.
## Things to know before using this modpack:
- Motion blur **will** decrease your FPS. To still have high FPS while using it, go to "SS Motion Blur" in Yqloss Client in OneConfig (Press RSHIFT) and put it to "Instant (Balanced)" (You don't need to disable Fast Render).
